title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FabAlley

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FabAlley
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
